name: broadcast
label: VJ Broadcast
description: Live watch-link for the VJ output. A WebRTC signaling relay (rooms over WebSocket) lets viewers on the venue LAN — or, with TURN, anywhere — open a link and watch the live visuals with audio, peer-to-peer (no media passes through the server, so quality/latency stay venue-grade). Serves a self-contained viewer page. Disable to turn off broadcasting.
